main.description: EXPERIMENTAL. An emoji reaction to a post in a private group feed.

subject.description: The post being reacted to. A strongRef-style (uri + cid) pointer; in a published deployment this would ref com.atproto.repo.strongRef.

emoji.description: The reaction emoji, as a short grapheme cluster.

strongRef.description: A reference to a specific record by repo path and content hash. Local analogue of com.atproto.repo.strongRef.

uri.description: at:// URI of the referenced record: at://<authority>/<collection>/<rkey>.

cid.description: Content identifier of the referenced record. In this experiment a BLAKE3 digest stands in for a real CIDv1; see record.rs.
